workspace.plugins.create.help: Lowercase letters, digits, dash, underscore. The folder, manifest, and main.lua are created with sensible defaults.

workspace.plugins.empty_main:
Select a plugin from the sidebar,
or create a new one via Plugin → Create.
workspace.plugins.empty_side: No plugins installed. Drop a plugin folder under {0} and click Refresh, or create one via Plugin → Create.
workspace.plugins.error_server_not_runni: Plugin requires the internal server, but it's stopped. Start it from the Information workspace and try again.
workspace.plugins.form.empty: No input fields yet — add one to give the user something to fill in before running.
workspace.plugins.form.placeholder: Visual form builder is coming next — for now this tab is a placeholder.
workspace.plugins.manifest.author: Author
workspace.plugins.manifest.debug_help: When on, the run dialog shows a collapsible debug panel with each command's output and logs.
workspace.plugins.manifest.name: Name
workspace.plugins.manifest.progress_help: When on, the run dialog renders a live progress bar — the plugin is expected to call formidable.progress.tick(done, total, msg) per item. Leave off for plugins that don't tick (an empty bar would be misleading). The Stop button is always available either way.
workspace.plugins.manifest.requires_inte: When on, formidable.api.fetch is unlocked in Lua and the run is blocked unless the wiki HTTP server is running.
workspace.plugins.manifest.run_mode_help: Modal: each command appears as a card; ctx is empty. Form: the plugin's form is the entry point and every command receives its values as ctx.
workspace.plugins.manifest.title: Manifest
workspace.plugins.source.help: main.lua — global functions are exposed as command targets. Ctrl+Enter toggles fullscreen.
workspace.plugins.source.title: Lua Source
